ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "xcoord" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the city */,
  "ycoord" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Current weather conditions */,
  "traffic_density" INTEGER /* Traffic density of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., available, in use, under maintenance) */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the driver */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the driver's shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the driver's shift */,
  "breaks_taken" INTEGER /* Number of breaks taken by the driver */,
  "total_hours_worked" INTEGER /* Total hours worked by the driver */,
  "rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the driver */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the shipment is located */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the shipment */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the shipment */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Profit associated with the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time of the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time of the shipment */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the shipment */,
  "fragile" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipment is fragile */,
  "insurance_value" INTEGER /* Insurance value of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being transported */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the route */,
  "estimated_time_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival */,
  "actual_time_arrival" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the route */,
  "route_plan" TEXT /* Detailed route plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic update */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being updated */,
  "traffic_condition" TEXT /* Current traffic condition */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Current road conditions */,
  "expected_delay" REAL /* Expected delay due to traffic */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_updates_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_coordinates" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS coordinate */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being tracked */,
  "xcoord" REAL /* X-coordinate of the vehicle */,
  "ycoord" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the vehicle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the GPS reading */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_coordinates_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver being logged */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity being performed by the driver */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the driver during the activity */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_logs_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_due" TEXT /* Next due date for maintenance */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Service provider who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the shipment */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for the status */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time for the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_status_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_info" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., delivery time, payment method) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being tracked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time of the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time of the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Unique tracking number for the shipment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_tracking_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_info ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Specific type of report (e.g., delivery, fuel consumption) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report if stored as a file */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
